properties.comment: Temporal Sequenced Rewrites Test Cases for SPJ queries
properties.entry: SEQUENCED TEMPORAL ( SELECT r.* FROM TEMP_TEST WITH TIME(T_BEGIN, T_END) r WHERE A = 2 AND EXISTS (SELECT * FROM TEMP_TEST WITH TIME(T_BEGIN, T_END) s) );
SEQUENCED TEMPORAL ( SELECT r.* FROM TEMP_TEST WITH TIME(T_BEGIN, T_END) r WHERE A = 2 AND EXISTS (SELECT * FROM TEMP_TEST WITH TIME(T_BEGIN, T_END) s WHERE r.a = s.b) );

SEQUENCED TEMPORAL ( SELECT r.* FROM TEMP_TEST WITH TIME(T_BEGIN, T_END) r WHERE A = 2 AND EXISTS (SELECT * FROM TEMP_TEST WITH TIME(T_BEGIN, T_END) s WHERE r.a = s.b) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM TEMP_TEST WITH TIME(T_BEGIN, T_END) t WHERE r.b = t.b + 10) );
